控制哪些功能入口在左侧边栏显示，简化您的工作区: Choose which tools appear in the sidebar.
控制关闭窗口时是否隐藏到托盘并保留正在运行的挂载: Keep running in tray when the window is closed.
关闭窗口后继续运行: Keep running after closing the window
有活动挂载时仍会自动进入托盘，避免直接断开映射。: Active mounts still keep the app in the tray to avoid disconnecting mappings.
查看媒体处理和远程挂载依赖的当前可执行文件位置: View executable paths used by media and remote mounts.
当前设备的硬件与系统配置状态: Hardware and system status for this device
使用 rclone 将 FTP、SFTP、WebDAV 映射为本地磁盘或目录: Map FTP, SFTP, and WebDAV as local drives or folders with rclone
尚未安装应用内 rclone，期望版本: In-app rclone is not installed, expected version
配置远程服务、测试连接并控制本地挂载状态: Configure remote services, test connections, and control mount status
挂载目录已存在：\n{target}\n\n是否自动改为：\n{suggeste:
Mount folder already exists:
{target}

Automatically change to:
{suggested}?
请手动修改挂载路径后再保存。: Please manually change the mount path before saving.
查看全局应用运行状态和历史记录: View global app status and run history
编辑本地 hosts 文件，管理 DNS 解析记录: Edit the local hosts file and manage DNS records
安装或修复后，后续添加、启用、停用、删除记录将通过受限后台服务写入 hosts；: After installation or repair, adding, enabling, disabling, and deleting records will write hosts through the restricted background service. After uninstalling, the app falls back to system authorization.
暂无自定义解析。请在上方表单添加第一条记录。: No custom records yet. Add the first record above.
使用正则表达式高级批量重命名文件: Batch rename files with advanced regular expressions
支持 $1, $2 分组，使用 $INDEX 插入自增序号: Supports $1, $2 groups and $INDEX for an auto-increment index
未选择文件夹或文件夹内无文件: No folder selected or the folder contains no files
当前平台未配置下载源: No download source is configured for this platform
将常见图片格式及 RAW/HEIC 转换为 WebP 或 AVIF，支持单文件与: Convert common image formats and RAW/HEIC to WebP or AVIF, with single-file and folder processing
调整图片画质、特效等参数: Adjust image quality, effects, and related options
选择要处理的文件或文件夹: Choose files or folder to process
1 only processes the current folder; 2 includes first-level subfolders...
留空则与源文件同级目录: Leave empty to use the source file folder
支持格式：JPG · PNG · GIF · BMP · TIFF · HEIC: Supported formats: JPG · PNG · GIF · BMP · TIFF · HEIC · AVIF · RAW and more
请选择受支持的图片格式，不支持视频或其他文件。: Please choose supported image formats. Videos and other files are not supported.
将视频转换为动态 WebP、高压缩比 AV1 或提取音频，支持批量处理。: Convert videos to animated WebP, high-compression AV1, or extract audio, with batch processing
参数全部为 0 时不启用该滤镜。参数详情请参考：: The filter is disabled when all parameters are 0. See parameter details:
平滑单帧画面的明暗噪点。: Smooth luma noise in a single frame.
平滑单帧画面的色彩噪点。: Smooth chroma noise in a single frame.
降低连续帧之间的明暗闪烁。: Reduce luma flicker across consecutive frames.
降低连续帧之间的色彩闪烁。: Reduce chroma flicker across consecutive frames.
仅影响 WebP 与 AV1 画面的四周圆角裁剪。: Only affects rounded corner cropping for WebP and AV1 frames.
数值越小画质越好，体积越大；NVENC 使用 CQ，软件编码使用 CRF。: Lower values improve quality and increase size; NVENC uses CQ, software encoders use CRF.
选择一个文件查看详情: Select a file to view details
浏览、编辑、创建和删除文件与目录: Browse, edit, create, and delete files and folders
将永久删除文件夹「{name}」及其所有内容，此操作不可撤销。: This will permanently delete folder "{name}" and all its contents. This cannot be undone.
将永久删除文件「{name}」，此操作不可撤销。: This will permanently delete file "{name}". This cannot be undone.
留空则使用推荐盘符: Leave empty to use the recommended drive letter
未发现可处理的图片或视频: No processable images or videos found
释放以导入文件或文件夹: Release to import files or folders
支持图片、视频和包含媒体的文件夹: Supports images, videos, and folders containing media
拖拽内容中同时发现图片和视频，请选择要导入的处理页面。: Both images and videos were found in the dropped content. Choose the processing page to import into.
重试次数必须是 0-100 的整数: Retries must be an integer from 0 to 100
低层重试次数必须是 0-100 的整数: Low-level retries must be an integer from 0 to 100
卸载后将恢复为系统授权写入 hosts: After uninstalling, hosts writes will fall back to system authorization
在文件管理器中定位 hosts 文件: Reveal hosts file in file manager
VFS 缓存上限格式无效: Invalid VFS cache max size format
VFS 缓存保留时间格式无效: Invalid VFS cache max age format
“{name}” 中同时发现图片和视频，请选择要导入的处理页面。: Both images and videos were found in "{name}". Choose which processing page to import into.
已拖入 {count} 个项目，其中同时发现图片和视频，请选择要导入的处理页面。: Dropped {count} items containing both images and videos. Choose which processing page to import into.
p1 最快，p7 质量最高，推荐 p5。: p1 is fastest, p7 has the highest quality. p5 is recommended.
数值越大越快，压缩率越低，推荐 6。: Higher values are faster with lower compression. 6 is recommended.
刷新缓存失败，请尝试重新挂载。: Failed to refresh cache. Try remounting.
越小越接近实时，但会增加 FTP 目录读取压力。: Smaller values are closer to real time, but increase FTP directory read pressure.
远端响应超时，目录可能未刷新: Remote response timed out. The directory may not be refreshed.
检测到残留挂载，可点击修复: Stale mount detected. Click repair to clean it up.
打印当前账号可访问的顶层目录，并为每个目录创建独立挂载。: Print top-level directories accessible to the current account and create an independent mount for each one.
未探测到可访问目录，请检查账号权限或手动添加目录。: No accessible directories detected. Check account permissions or add a directory manually.
手动添加目录名，如 Video 或 home: Manually add a directory name, such as Video or home
FTP 根目录仅用于探测，不建议作为长期挂载入口。: The FTP root is only used for probing and is not recommended as a long-term mount entry.
FTP 根目录挂载不稳定，建议探测并挂载具体顶层目录: Mounting the FTP root is unstable. Detect and mount specific top-level directories instead.
连接只保存服务器和凭据，远端目录将在探测后创建为工作区。: A connection stores only the server and credentials. Remote directories become workspaces after probing.
请填写连接名称、主机和用户名: Enter the connection name, host, and username
请选择至少一个可访问目录: Select at least one accessible directory
删除连接会同时删除其工作区，是否继续？: Deleting the connection also deletes its workspaces. Continue?
一个连接保存一套 NAS 凭据，可探测并创建多个共享目录绑定。: One connection stores one NAS credential set and can create bindings for multiple shares.
原生 SMB 不需要 WinFsp 或 macFUSE；只有 FTP 聚合挂载需: Native SMB does not require WinFsp or macFUSE. Only FTP aggregate mounts require a system mount dependency.
原生 SMB 优先，FTP 自动聚合回退: Native SMB first, with automatic FTP aggregate fallback
暂无挂载工作区，请先保存连接并探测目录。: No mount workspaces. Save a connection and probe directories first.
FTP 聚合挂载需要先安装 {name}: Install {name} before using FTP aggregate mounts
FTP 聚合挂载需要先安装系统挂载依赖: Install the system mount dependency before using FTP aggregate mounts
SMB 和 FTP 均未通过认证，无法创建工作区。: Neither SMB nor FTP authenticated, so a workspace cannot be created.
SMB 使用系统原生共享，FTP 使用已探测目录构建单一聚合入口。: SMB uses native system shares. FTP builds one aggregate entry from probed directories.
NAS 本地账户优先使用“主机\\用户名”，域账户使用“域\\用户名”。: NAS local accounts prefer host\username; domain accounts use domain\username.
清理该主机的全部 SMB 映射: Clean all SMB mappings for this host
将断开当前 Windows 用户中所有来自 {host} 的 SMB 映射，包括: This will disconnect every SMB mapping from {host} in the current Windows user session, including network drives created outside this app, and disable related workspaces. Continue?
